title: The Road to Sabaody: Rising Conflict
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Brook, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Whitebeard as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Brook, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Yeah, we'll meet him when that happens!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Oh right, zero, you were asleep.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: So, you haven't done it yet--?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: BUWAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA- haha!! That's my grandson for ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Shut the hell up, GARP, you bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Ouch!! Uwah!! So sweet... it's good!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I don't care!! Pass over it----!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That day... it was raining fiercely.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: We've grown a lot since that time...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: It took me so years... YoHoho.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Shishishishish!!! Anyway, we are halfway done!!

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Brook, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #19, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: rising conflict.
